DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $143.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SHAIKH, HANIF
